title: Low Effort Ruby Mod (LERM)
description: A low effort Ruby mod that adds Ruby ore, tools and armor maded in less than one day.
body:
This mod adds ruby. Created with MCreator.


[Join the Discord server](https://discord.gg/Z6Z3Dr99qK)
